name: Muradin
description: A sturdy Tank that can do well in a multitude of situations.
title: Mountain King
info: Once a mentor to Prince Arthas, Muradin was unable to prevent his corruption. After recovering from a mild case of amnesia, he is now the leader of the Bronzebeard clan after the "diamond-ization" of his brother King Magni.

Muradin.name: Storm Bolt
Muradin.description: Throw a hammer, dealing 110 (+4% per level) damage to the first enemy hit and Stunning them for 1.25 seconds  Quest: Basic Attack Heroes affected by Stuns, Slows, or Roots. Slowed or Rooted enemies grant 1 stack. Stunned enemies provide 2 stacks.  If the Hero dies within 3 seconds, gain 5 stacks.  Reward: Upon hitting 45 targets, Storm Bolt pierces to hit an additional target, and Muradin's Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Storm Bolt by 0.5 seconds.  Mythic Reward: Upon hitting 160 targets, Storm Bolt's range is increased by 50%, width increased by 100%, and now pierces all targets.

Muradin.name: Thunder Clap
Muradin.description: Blast nearby enemies for 96 (+4% per level) damage and Slow them by 30% for 2.5 seconds. Heroes hit also have their Attack Speed reduced by 30% for the duration.

Muradin.name: Dwarf Toss
Muradin.description: Leap to target location, dealing 59 (+4% per level) damage to enemies on landing. Upon leaping, gain 30 Armor for 2 seconds, reducing damage taken by 30%.

Muradin.name: Avatar
Muradin.description: Transform for 20 seconds, gaining 1000 (+4% per level) Health.

Muradin.name: Haymaker
Muradin.description: Stun target enemy Hero, and wind up a punch dealing 319 (+4% per level) damage and knocking the target back, hitting enemies in the way for 319 (+4% per level) damage and knocking them aside.

Muradin.name: Second Wind
Muradin.description: Muradin restores 55 (+4% per level) Health per second when he has not taken damage for 4 seconds. When below 40% Health, increased to 111 (+4% per level) Health per second.

1.name: Dwarf Block
1.description: Casting Dwarf Toss grants 3 charges of Block. Each Block charge grants 75 Physical Armor against a single enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing the damage taken by 75%.

1.name: Third Wind
1.description: Increases Health Restoration rate to 90 (+4% per level) per second, and raises Health threshold to 60% Health for improved 180 (+4% per level) per second Restoration.

1.name: Give 'em the Axe!
1.description: Attacking a Hero that is Stunned, Rooted, or Slowed increases Muradin's Basic Attack damage by 40% for 3 seconds.

4.name: Sledgehammer
4.description: Storm Bolt deals 500% damage to non-Heroic enemies.  Stormbolt cooldown is reduced by 1.5 seconds.

4.name: Reverberation
4.description: Increases the Attack Speed Slow of Thunder Clap from 30% to 50% and the duration from 2.5 seconds to 3.5 seconds. Each enemy Hero hit reduces your Heroic Ability cooldown by 5%.

4.name: Thunder Burn
4.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Thunder Clap triggers a second Thunder Clap explosion 2 seconds later in the same location that deals 72 (+4% per level) damage.

7.name: Perfect Storm
7.description: Storm Bolt's cooldown is reset and 25 Mana is refunded if an enemy dies within 3 seconds of being hit by it. This effect has an 8.5 second cooldown.

7.name: Heavy Impact
7.description: Enemies hit by Dwarf Toss are Slowed by 80% for 1.5 seconds.

7.name: Skullcracker
7.description: Every 3rd Basic Attack against the same enemy deals 90% bonus damage and Stuns them for 0.25 seconds.

10.name: Avatar
10.description: Transform for 20 seconds, gaining 1000 (+4% per level) Health.

10.name: Haymaker
10.description: Stun target enemy Hero, and wind up a punch dealing 319 (+4% per level) damage and knocking the target back, hitting enemies in the way for 319 (+4% per level) damage and knocking them aside.

13.name: Bronzebeard Rage
13.description: Deal 15 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies and heal for 75% of the damage dealt. Hitting an enemy Hero with Storm Bolt increase this damage by 200% for 3 seconds.

13.name: Healing Static
13.description: Muradin heals for 6% of his maximum Health for each Hero hit by Thunder Clap.

13.name: Thunder Strike
13.description: Thunder Clap deals 200% more damage if only one target is hit.  Passive: Increase the duration of Dwarf Toss's Armor by 2 seconds.

16.name: Dwarf Launch
16.description: Increase the range of Dwarf Toss by 30%. Hitting an enemy Hero with Dwarf Toss reduces its cooldown by 1 second.

16.name: Stoneform
16.description: Activate to heal Muradin for 30% of his maximum Health over 10 seconds. Second Wind is disabled during this time.

16.name: Imposing Presence
16.description: Activate to reduce the Attack Speed by 50% and Movement Speed by 20% of nearby Heroes and Summons for 2.5 seconds.  Passive: Heroes and Summons that attack your Hero have their Attack Speed Slowed by 20% for 2.5 seconds.

20.name: Unstoppable Force
20.description: While active, Avatar grants 20 Armor and causes Muradin's Basic Attacks to reduce the cooldowns of Thunder Clap and Dwarf Toss by 0.75 seconds.

20.name: Grand Slam
20.description: Haymaker gains a 2nd charge and its damage is increased by 25%. If a Hero dies within 3 seconds of being hit by Haymaker, instantly gain 1 charge.

20.name: Mountain King
20.description: Thunder Clap and Dwarf Toss each gain a 2nd charge.

20.name: Hardened Shield
20.description: Activate to gain 75 Armor for 4 seconds, taking 75% less damage.

tooltipMarkup.GenericImposingPresenceTalent: Activate to reduce the Attack Speed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,TalentImposingPresenceActivatedDebuff,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor"/>%</c> and Movement Speed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,TalentImposingPresenceActivatedDebuffSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> of nearby Heroes and Summons for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TalentImposingPresenceActivatedDebuffSlow,Duration"precision="2"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Heroes and Summons that attack your Hero have their Attack Speed Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,TalentImposingPresenceDamageResponseDebuff,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TalentImposingPresenceDamageResponseDebuff,Duration"precision="2"/> </c>seconds.
tooltipMarkup.HardenedShieldTalent: Activate to gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HardenedShield,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HardenedShield,Duration"/></c> seconds, taking <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HardenedShield,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/>%</c> less damage.

Hitting an enemy Hero with Dwarf Toss reduces its cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,MuradinDwarfTossDwarfLaunchTalentModifyCooldown,Cost[0].ChargeTimeUse"/></c> second.

When below <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Validator,MuradinSecondWindLifeValidator,Value"/>%</c> Health, increased to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MuradinSecondWindCriticalCreateHealer,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> Health per second.

Second Wind is disabled during this time.

Each enemy Hero hit reduces your Heroic Ability cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Effect,MuradinThunderClapReverberationModifyHeroicCooldown,Cost[0].Fraction.Cooldown"/>%</c>.
